model: Codex account default via Codex SDK

trace.action: Created a typed interaction in an isolated no-network workspace.
Revalidated the manifest after the Codex build pass.
Prepared the schema-safe interaction for rendering.

interaction.prompt: Select all three lantern hotspots to complete the collection.
interaction.completionMessage: All three lantern hotspots are collected. The interaction is complete.

codexAgents.name: Codex interaction builder
codexAgents.role: Created the story-specific typed mechanic in an isolated, no-network workspace.
codexAgents.result: Refined the manifest's single interaction as an order-independent collection task.

codexAgents.name: Codex grounding review
codexAgents.role: Checked evidence references without inventing family history.
codexAgents.result: Uses only the three existing lantern hotspot IDs. The copy describes interaction progress and completion without adding story facts or altering claims.

codexTests.name: Codex interaction compile
codexTests.detail: The scene explicitly allows collecting the three lanterns in any order, and each hotspot represents independent evidence. No required sequence is established.

codexTests.name: Hotspot allowlist
codexTests.detail: 3 distinct generated interaction references resolve in the scene.

codexTests.name: Post-build schema
codexTests.detail: The final manifest passed Zod and referential checks.

note: No family media, credentials, private-user prompts, or temporary workspace paths are retained.
